title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: Verify that after a fresh install and onboarding, tapping "Get Started" on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen returns to the "Organized" screen.
steps: Fresh install: App not yet installed.
Go through onboarding until reaching the 'Organized' screen.
Verify that the 'Welcome to Poly Studio' screen appears.
Tap 'Get Started' to close the welcome screen.
Return to the 'Organized' screen to continue onboarding.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears after reaching the "Organized" screen. After tapping "Get Started", the welcome screen closes and returns to the "Organized" screen to continue onboarding.
